economic_notes: First Nation has 25% equity interest in Niiwin Limited Partnership (NLP) and Niiwin General Partner Inc. (NGPI). Also has 51% interest in M'Hiigan General Partner Inc. and 50.99% in M'Hiigan Limited Partnership (no operating activity). NLP revenue was $17,961,522 in 2021. Resource revenue sharing agreement deferred revenue of $1,433,544 noted.
notes: GBEs (Niiwin LP and M'Hiigan LP) accounted for using modified equity method — not fully consolidated. M'Hiigan LP has no operating activity to date. Minor children distribution trust funds of $31,354 are excluded from consolidated statements. Restricted cash of $43,547 held for CMHC replacement reserve; required amount is $91,311. Audit report dated March 3, 2023 — nearly two years after fiscal year end. Resource revenue sharing agreement resulted in $1,433,544 deferred revenue in 2021 (new item vs 2020). total_government_transfers estimated as Federal funding + Grants and subsidies + Provincial funding = 3490987+1772895+785208.
